pulse: The Real Estate sector currently trades at a median EV/EBITDA of 20.4x and a median P/E of 39.2x, reflecting a premium relative to the broader market. Notably, Prologis (PLD) is positioned at a higher EV/EBITDA of 26.2x and a trailing P/E of 39.2x, suggesting strong investor confidence, especially in light of recent deals highlighting digital rights in commercial real estate, as reported by newswire.com. For investors, the resurgence of commercial real estate opportunities, as indicated in headlines and the sector's demonstrated revenue growth of 11%, suggests potential upside amidst evolving market dynamics.
